beneficiaries must have at least one inpatient or SNF claim, or two-Part B 
(institutional or non-institutional) claims that are at least one day apart with a breast cancer code in 
any position during the one-year reference period. When two claims are required, they must occur at 
least one day apart. 

The CCW’s criteria were developed after reviewing validated algorithms from the research literature
